name: Soft Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the dried apricots and cut them into small pieces. Add 1/4 cup sugar and 1/4 cup water, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes. Allow to cool.
2. Remove any particles of core from the apples. Cut the apples into small pieces and add 1/4 cup sugar and 1/4 cup water. Cover and simmer until tender.
3. Remove stems from the figs, cut them into small pieces, and add 1/4 cup water. Simmer for a few minutes until softened.
4. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, stirring gently until well mixed.
